question: Which flight numbers correspond to United Airlines flights?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FlightNo FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRLINES AS T2 ON T2.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.Airline  =  "United Airlines"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_1 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_2 = 'United Airlines'
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_1 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_2 = 'United Airlines'
